The First Craft

Henna Artistry

Natural, skin-safe henna for every occasion — bridal mehndi, Eid, parties, and everyday adornment. Rich floral detail, fine linework, and designs that stain deep and last.

Bridal Henna Eid Designs Hand & Foot Art

The Second Craft

Fashion Design

Custom and ready-to-wear pieces, designing confidence where fabric becomes art. Bridal, party, evening, and everyday wear, fitted to blend style, comfort, and personality.

About Hannah

"Designing confidence — one stitch, one stain at a time."

Based in Ilorin, Morenikeji Hannah brings together two crafts under one hand: natural, skin-safe henna art and custom fashion design. From bridal mehndi to ready-to-wear pieces, every design is made to fit the person wearing it — their skin, their style, their occasion. All ages, all occasions are welcome.

6+Years Experience
AllAges Welcome
IlorinKwara State
What's Offered

Services

✦

Bridal Henna

Detailed hand and foot mehndi for brides — rich, deep-staining, and made to last through the celebration.

✦

Eid & Party Henna

Natural, skin-safe henna designs for Eid, parties, and everyday occasions — for all ages.

✦

Custom Tailoring

Made-to-measure pieces — bridal, evening, and everyday wear, fitted to your body and your style.

✦

Ready-to-Wear

Modern, timeless pieces ready to wear — designed with the same care as custom orders.
